title: cymbidium × veitchii
intro: Cymbidium × veitchii, also known as the veitch's cymbidium or veitch's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium sinense. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium × veitchii include its potential to reduce cardiovascular disease risk, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a variety of ailments.
